summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification shard. No shared canonical was selected; open PRs are classified independently unless a security-sensitive signal requires quarantine. No GitHub mutations are planned.

actions.reason: Unique narrow performance PR with no hydrated duplicate or superseding canonical in this inventory shard.
Distinct gateway availability fix; failing checks and unhydrated bot feedback make this a keep-independent classification.
Broad feature/config PR with unique scope; no closure-safe duplicate or superseding candidate is hydrated.
Large distinct UI feature PR; keep independently for maintainer review rather than dedupe or closure.

Independent UX/gateway clarification PR with no duplicate relationship established.
Unique Signal channel feature/fix PR; keep independently for validation.
Maintainer-owned broad hook API work needs explicit maintainer judgment; plan mode should not close or merge it.
Distinct Teams channel cleanup fix; keep independently pending proof.
Narrow unique ACP bugfix remains independently reviewable; validation blocks stronger action.
Distinct auth/provider behavior fix; linked issue refs are not hydrated enough for closeout or fixed-by-candidate action.
Independent agents/model-fallback bugfix; keep pending proof and check cleanup.
This is a proof-sufficient, waiting-on-author PR with broad model/auth implications; maintainer technical judgment is required before any closure or merge recommendation.
Independent API feature PR; no dedupe relationship or close-safe evidence is present.
Distinct Android compatibility/availability fix with failing Android validation; keep independently.
A specific unresolved human review concern is present in the hydrated artifact, so maintainer/developer judgment is needed before classification stronger than needs_human.

Already closed in live hydrated state; no mutation should be planned.
This item contains explicit SSRF/CVE/GHSA and private-network bypass language, so it is quarantined even though the artifact summary did not premark it security_sensitive.
Distinct Windows availability bugfix; keep independently because validation is failing and no close-safe relationship is established.

Distinct Discord metadata feature; no duplicate or superseding canonical is hydrated.
Independent CLI/skills feature PR; keep pending proof and test resolution.
